title: Unnecessary calls to .bind() should be avoided
description: Unnecessary calls to .bind() should be avoided. The .bind() method allows specifying the value of 'this' and optionally the values of some function arguments. However, if 'this' is not used in the function body, calls to .bind() do nothing and should be removed. Calling .bind() on arrow functions is always unnecessary because arrow functions don't have their own 'this' binding. NOTE: This regex-based implementation can only detect arrow functions with .bind() calls. Full detection of unnecessary .bind() on regular functions requires AST analysis to determine if 'this' is used in the function body.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Unnecessary call to .bind() on arrow function. Arrow functions don't have their own 'this' binding and cannot be rebound.
